summary: Tested Iteration 2 features: 1) Subscription prices reverted to production values (Assist=₹499, Smart=₹999, Auto=₹1999), 2) Chatbot conversation memory with session_id working correctly. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified.

issues: shadow* style props deprecation warnings (cosmetic, not functional)

critical_code_review_comments: Subscription prices correctly reverted: Assist=499, Smart=999, Auto=1999 INR
Frontend subscription.tsx displays production prices without test banners
Chatbot session_id correctly implemented in frontend (useState with sess_<timestamp>_<random>)
Backend chatbot_service.py _load_session_history method correctly queries by session_id
session_id stored in chat_history MongoDB collection
Conversation memory verified working - follow-up questions reference previous context
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with business 'Test Corp'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 features fully verified: subscription prices at production values (499/999/1999 INR), chatbot conversation memory working with session_id. Frontend correctly generates session_id as 'sess_<timestamp>_<random>' and sends it with each message. Backend stores session_id in chat_history and loads previous turns for LLM context.

frontend_tests: Subscription page shows ₹499 for Assist Plan
Subscription page shows ₹999 for Smart Plan
Subscription page shows ₹1999 for Auto Plan
No test banners or strikethrough prices
Chatbot page loads with TOMI Assistant header
